this file is in a sub dir.

# Purpose
Create two directories, dir1 and dir2. dir1 contains a file f1.txt.

dir2 has two files:
  - f1.txt (identical to dir1's f1.txt)
  - f2.txt (same content as f1.txt but different name)

# Expected Outcome
The program should identify:
  - One "Moved / Renamed / Copied" file (f1.txt to f2.txt)
  - No modified files
  - No added/deleted files

# Files
dir1/f1.txt
dir2/f1.txt
dir2/f2.txt
